scenes.name: Land on Slide Builder
scenes.note: Let the viewer take in the two-pane workflow: templates on top, markdown editor on the left, live preview on the right.

scenes.name: Name the deck
scenes.note: Replace the generic title with a concrete deck name to show this is a real working composer.

scenes.name: Observe updated title
scenes.note: Notice the title field now frames the presentation as a polished product deck.

scenes.name: Replace markdown with product story
scenes.selector:
textarea[placeholder="# Slide 1 title
Body here…

---

# Slide 2 title
- bullet
- bullet"]
scenes.text:
# ClawDash
Analytics that ship every morning.

---

## Why teams use it
- Wake up to a clean KPI brief
- Spot movement before standup
- Share one portable HTML deck

---

## Weekly snapshot
- Revenue up 12%
- Activation up 8%
- Churn down 3%

---

## What makes it fast
- Markdown in
- Live preview out
- One-file export for sharing
scenes.note: Paste concise multi-slide markdown so the preview can visibly re-render into a product presentation.

scenes.name: Observe live deck refresh
scenes.note: Notice the preview updates immediately from the markdown, proving the live composer loop.

scenes.name: Try the Minimalist template
scenes.note: Select the first visible house template to show how the same content can be restyled instantly.

scenes.name: Observe style swap
scenes.note: The preview should now feel lighter and more editorial, while the slide content stays intact.

scenes.name: Switch to Terminal Green
scenes.note: Choose a markedly different preset to emphasize the range of built-in slide styles.

scenes.name: Observe second style change
scenes.note: Watch for the deck's typography and color system to change without touching the markdown.

scenes.name: Return to the house dark style
scenes.note: Bring the demo back to the highlighted Council Signal look for a polished final state.

scenes.name: Observe restored house style
scenes.note: Notice the rich dark aesthetic reappears, reinforcing that template changes are reversible and instant.

scenes.name: Hover export button
scenes.note: Feature the portable export action without triggering a download during the recording.
